title: Intent/Access spec
description: The desired-state payload for a host-access grant (charter §2.4, §4.2 'additive claims, per-element provenance'; ADR-0036). Governs OS-level access on estate hosts — local admin-group membership, sudoers rules, SSH authorized_keys, local accounts — NOT platform authorization (which stays the CaC/OpenFGA tuple spine, §2.5). `subject` is the host-local account the grant is for — deliberately NOT the platform Principal Named Kind (§2), to keep the host/platform identity boundary sharp. One Intent declares one grant; the compiled Baseline ensures-contains {subject, kind, scope} in the host's observed access.grants (additive). Public keys only — private material never enters the graph (§1.2/§2.5). Typed at the seam per §1.1.

subject.description: the host-local account/subject the grant is for (not a platform Principal)

scope.description: kind-scoped detail: sudo command spec, group name, public-key fingerprint, or account shell
